hero.title: Your business deserves a digital presence that's
hero.subtitle: We help businesses grow in the digital world with fast, modern websites built to rank on Google and turn visitors into customers.

services.title: Choose your plan
services.subtitle: Simple, transparent pricing. No surprises.
services.card_portfolio_desc: A clean, fast, and professional digital presence. Ideal for service providers who want to be found online and build credibility.
services.card_landing_desc: A complete digital solution focused on conversion: SEO, contact form, domain setup, and guaranteed high performance.
services.card_mvp_desc: A complete digital solution for startups that need to launch fast, validate their idea, and win their first customers.
services.soon_video_desc: Editing for reels, ads, and institutional videos.
services.soon_instagram_desc: Visual content to engage and convert on social media.
services.soon_marketing_desc: Strategies to attract and convert customers across all digital channels.

process.title: From zero to live in days
process.subtitle: A clear and collaborative process so you always know what's happening.
process.step1_desc: We align ideas, goals, and the best approach for your project.
process.step2_desc: You provide content and references. We define the structure together before development begins.
process.step3_desc: Design, code, SEO, and integrations. Everything built to perform and convert.
process.step4_desc: You review the beta version and we make adjustments together. Up to 2 rounds included.
process.step5_desc: Deploy, domain setup, and delivery. Your solution goes live.
process.step6_desc: Optional monthly plan for hosting, security updates, and continuous improvements.

about.title: Digital solutions that generate real results
about.body: Duete Solutions was born from the belief that digitalizing a business goes far beyond having a website. We help companies build a solid and strategic digital presence that attracts customers and drives real growth.
about.bullet1_text: : your business knowledge combined with our execution.
about.bullet2_text: : every project is built from scratch, tailored to your brand.
about.bullet3_text: : solutions built to rank on Google and convert visitors into customers.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do I need to provide the content?
faq.a1: Yes, but we can help. You provide basic texts and images, and we take care of the structure, copywriting, and visual optimization.
faq.a2: On average 10 to 15 business days after briefing approval. More complex projects may take up to 30 days.
faq.q3: Is the monthly maintenance plan required?
faq.a3: No, it's optional. We offer a monthly plan starting at R$97 that includes hosting, updates, and ongoing support.
faq.q4: Will you offer video and social media in the future?
faq.a4: Yes! Video production and social media management are already in our plans for soon. Stay tuned.
faq.a5: Not yet, but it's in development. We currently focus on organic SEO and on-site conversion.
